_comment: Offline OSV (Open Source Vulnerabilities) snapshot shipped with GitLoom. Consulted at review time with NO network access (P2-11 rejection trigger). Keyed by ecosystem-agnostic 'name@version'. Refreshed out-of-band; the review path only ever reads this embedded copy.

advisories.name: semver
advisories.summary: Regular expression denial of service in semver.range.

advisories.name: left-pad-evil
advisories.summary: Known-malicious package used by the P2-11 poisoned-branch canary fixture.
